task_completion.description: The 'Implement biometric login (Face ID / Fingerprint)' work package in the 'mobile-banking-app' project has the required comment and its status is updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the work package details page with the comment 'Blocked by ecommerce-platform checkout security fixes. Cannot deploy biometric auth until Safari checkout bug is resolved. See ecommerce-platform Sprint 1.' and the status set to 'On hold' (or subject changed to '[BLOCKED] Implement biometric login...').

task_completion.description: A new 'Task' work package titled 'Cross-project dependency tracking dashboard' is created in the 'devops-automation' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the new work package in the 'devops-automation' project with the correct subject 'Cross-project dependency tracking dashboard' and type 'Task'.

task_completion.description: The new 'Cross-project dependency tracking dashboard' work package has the correct assignee, sprint, and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the work package details showing Assignee as 'carol.williams', Version/Sprint as 'Sprint 3 - Monitoring', and the description 'Build a dashboard to visualize cross-project work package dependencies and blockers across all three projects.'

task_completion.description: The priority of 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' in the 'ecommerce-platform' project is set to 'High'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the work package 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' with its Priority field set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: A wiki page titled 'Cross-Project Dependencies' is created in the 'mobile-banking-app' project documenting the dependency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Wiki page in the 'mobile-banking-app' project titled 'Cross-Project Dependencies' containing text that mentions both project names ('mobile-banking-app', 'ecommerce-platform'), both work package subjects ('Implement biometric login...', 'Fix broken checkout...'), and their blocking relationship.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenProject web interface to make changes, not terminal scripts or API calls.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenProject web UI in a browser window with the agent interacting with forms, buttons, and text fields.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenProject application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows localhost:8080 and the OpenProject interface is fully rendered with standard navigation menus, not a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by running a script containing the exact text from the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing curl commands or ruby scripts to update the database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The biometric work package subject is 'Implement biometric login (Face ID / Fingerprint)'. The checkout work package subject is 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari'. The new work package must be named 'Cross-project dependency tracking dashboard' and assigned to 'carol.williams'. The checkout work package priority must be 'High'. The wiki page title must be 'Cross-Project Dependencies'.
